'''World''' was the indigenous name for the [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of the [[Tripod]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Its exact location was unknown, but it was believed to be situated on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], somewhere between [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]] and [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].

A number of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were stationed on the planet in preparation for the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''{{'s}} mission to eliminate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] enclave located in [[Plett's Well|Plawal]], a [[City/Legends|city]] on Belsavis. When the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was disabled by [[Callista Ming]], the stormtroopers remained on the planet where they eventually died. When finally reactivated, the ''Eye of Palpatine'' stopped at World, where it sent a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to pick up a number of the native Tripods to replace the expected stormtroopers.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
